title: ByVoid
description: A comprehensive mod pack combining RPG, Fantasy, Exploring and Technology into one. For all those looking for adventure!
body:
**ByVoid**

ByVoid is a complex pack of mods based on combining various fields.
The package combines RPG, Exploring, Fantasy and Technology and Construction.
The pack adds a large number of new mobs, bosses, items, dungeons, biomes, dimensions, mechanics and activities that will certainly allow everyone to discover their favorite part.
Modpack changes both the way the world is generated and its behavior, such as the seasons.
Combined with resource packs and shaders, the pack will provide many unforgettable adventures!

Good Luck!
Travelers

*Due to the complexity of the package, it is recommended to allocate at least 8GB of RAM
